name: Sirui Zhou
headline: Engineering portfolio focused on robotics control, communication systems, computer vision, and game prototypes.
summary: I build practical prototypes across robotics, AI, signal processing, and interactive systems. My work usually combines software engineering with applied engineering constraints: safety checks, data flow, simulation, interfaces, and deployable demos.

education.details: Focus areas include robotics, signal processing, computer vision, embedded-style control workflows, and software prototyping.
